description.unified: Launches an attack that bounces 4 times starting from the nearest enemy, dealing M.DMG to each enemy hit. DMG increases by up to 100% the farther the enemy is. This attack is treated as a Normal Attack.
Deals M.DMG 2 time(s) to a random enemy and nearby enemies, and stuns them for 1sec. DMG increases by up to 200% the farther the enemy is.
Deals M.DMG 6 time(s) to enemies within range, knocks them back for [1sec->1.5sec], and reduces Crit Chance by [25%->60%] for [7sec->4sec]. DMG increases by up to 150% the farther the enemy is.
Attacks the farthest enemy, dealing M.DMG, knocking them back for [0.5sec->1sec], and increasing M.DMG taken by 20% for 6sec. DMG increases by up to 200% the farther the enemy is.

dark.unified: Reduces ACC of hit enemies by [150->500] for [7 sec->4 sec].

description.unified: [Twinkle Twinkle] Reduces M.Crit Resist by [(added) {0}], and this reduction becomes irremovable. [(removed) increases the duration by {0} sec].

dark.unified: Damage dealt to non-hero enemies is increased by [10%->15%], and damage taken is reduced by [10%->15%].
